decisions.reasoning: Despite the unexpected item, Hurricane remains a guaranteed OHKO on Rillaboom. Since I outspeed and can secure the KO immediately, I should prioritize removing the threat regardless of the item discrepancy.

Iron Hands threatens an OHKO with Wild Charge and its item is unknown, making it too risky to stay in; Flutter Mane provides a safe switch-in due to its immunity to Fighting-type moves and ability to threaten Iron Hands with super-effective STAB.
Flutter Mane is fainted, so I must bring in a healthy check to Iron Hands. Tornadus-Therian resists the Electric-type coverage that Iron Hands is using to threaten the team.

Flutter Mane outspeeds and OHKOs Urshifu with Moonblast or Dazzling Gleam, and since it lacks Booster Energy, it is likely holding Choice Specs or another item that makes it a lethal threat. Switching to Incineroar allows me to scout the item and potentially threaten with Intimidate or a pivot move.
